synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20918 Oracle Linux 9 container-selinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20918
description:
[4:2.240.0-3]
- Delete 405.patch. This was reverted upstream. If it's needed for OCP, this
can be revisited.
- Resolves: RHEL-123749

[4:2.240.0-2]
- Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues
- Resolves: RHEL-115180
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20918

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20918.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
container-selinux-2.240.0-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
container-selinux-2.240.0-3.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/container-selinux-2.240.0-3.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4:2.240.0-3]
- Delete 405.patch. This was reverted upstream. If it's needed for OCP, this
can be revisited.
- Resolves: RHEL-123749

[4:2.240.0-2]
- Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues
- Resolves: RHEL-115180
